rules.title: Applicability: IPO, FPO, rights, QIP, etc.
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Scope check not implemented; assume issuer is in scope."

rules.title: Reference date for meeting eligibility
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Reference date checks not modeled; assume eligibility."

rules.title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors debarred
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.is_debarred then "Issuer is debarred from capital markets."
      else if i.has_debarred_directors then "A director or promoter is debarred."
      else "Unknown debarment status.",
    remedy? := some "Remove debarment or wait until it expires."

rules.title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Cross‑company debarment check not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Disqualification: fraudulent borrower
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.is_fraudulent then "Issuer or promoter is a fraudulent borrower." else "",
    remedy? := some "Cease fraudulent activities and rectify records."

rules.title: Disqualification: fugitive economic offender
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.is_fugitive then "Promoter or director is a fugitive economic offender." else "",
    remedy? := some "Resolve fugitive status before filing."

rules.title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre‑IPO)
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.has_outstanding_convertibles && !(i.has_esop_exemption ∨ i.has_sar_exemption ∨ i.has_mandatory_convertibles) then
        "Outstanding convertibles/rights present without ESOP/SAR/mandatory conversion carve‑out."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Resolve outstanding convertibles/rights or obtain relevant exemptions."

rules.title: NTA ≥ ₹3 cr in each of the last 3 years
rules.check:
fun i =>
      lengthIs i.net_tangible_assets 3 ∧ allGeNat i.net_tangible_assets 30000000
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if !lengthIs i.net_tangible_assets 3 then
        "Need NTA figures for 3 full years."
      else if !allGeNat i.net_tangible_assets 30000000 then
        "One or more NTA figures are below ₹3 cr."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Provide NTA ≥ ₹3 cr for each of the last 3 full years."

rules.title: Monetary assets ≤ 50 % of NTA (or committed/used; OSF carve‑out)
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.is_offer_for_sale_only then ""
      else if i.monetary_asset_ratio > 50 && !i.used_monetary_assets then
        "Monetary assets exceed 50 % of NTA without evidence of use or commitment."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Use or commit excess monetary assets, or restructure to OSF‑only."

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of the last 3 years
rules.check:
fun i =>
      lengthIs i.operating_profits 3 ∧ allGeNat i.operating_profits 150000000
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if !lengthIs i.operating_profits 3 then
        "Need operating profit figures for 3 full years."
      else if !allGeNat i.operating_profits 150000000 then
        "One or more operating profit figures are below ₹15 cr."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥ ₹15 cr operating profit in each of the last 3 full years."

rules.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of the last 3 years
rules.check:
fun i =>
      lengthIs i.net_worths 3 ∧ allGeNat i.net_worths 10000000
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if !lengthIs i.net_worths 3 then
        "Need net worth figures for 3 full years."
      else if !allGeNat i.net_worths 10000000 then
        "One or more net worth figures are below ₹1 cr."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Increase equity/retained earnings to meet ≥ ₹1 cr in each of the last 3 full years."

rules.title: Name change → ≥50 % revenue from new activity
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.changed_name_recently && i.percent_revenue_from_new_name < 50 then
        "Changed name within 1 year but <50 % revenue from new‑name activity."
      else "",
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥50 % revenue from the activity indicated by the new name."

rules.title: QIB fallback when 6(1) not met
rules.failReason: fun _ => "6(1) satisfaction not modeled; assume QIB fallback not required."

rules.title: SR equity shares conditions
rules.check:
fun i =>
      (i.sr_net_worth == 0) ∨
      (i.is_tech_firm ∧ i.sr_holder_exec ∧
        (i.sr_voting_ratio ≥ 2 ∧ i.sr_voting_ratio ≤ 10) ∧
        i.sr_class_count == 1 ∧ i.sr_same_face_value ∧ i.sr_issued_3mo_prior)

rules.title: Apply to stock exchange (in‑principle)
rules.failReason:
fun i => if !i.applied_to_stock_exchange then "Issuer has not applied to a stock exchange." else "",
    remedy? := some "Apply to a stock exchange and designate one."

rules.title: Depository agreement executed
rules.failReason:
fun i => if !i.has_demat_agreement then "Depository agreement not executed." else "",
    remedy? := some "Execute a depository agreement."

rules.title: Promoters’ holdings fully in demat
rules.failReason:
fun i => if !i.promoter_securities_demat then "Promoter‑held securities not fully dematerialised." else "",
    remedy? := some "Dematerialise all promoter‑held securities."

rules.title: No partly‑paid equity outstanding
rules.failReason:
fun i => if !i.no_partly_paid_shares then "Partly‑paid equity shares are outstanding." else "",
    remedy? := some "Fully pay or forfeit all partly‑paid equity shares."

rules.title: 75 % means of finance tied up (verifiable)
rules.failReason:
fun i => if !i.finance_75_percent_done then "Less than 75 % of finance is tied up via verifiable means." else "",
    remedy? := some "Tie up 75 % of finance through verifiable means."

rules.title: General corporate purposes cap ≤ 25 %
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.general_corp_purpose_ratio > 25 then "General corporate purposes exceed 25 % of the issue amount." else "",
    remedy? := some "Reduce general corporate purposes to ≤ 25 %."

rules.title: OFS shares must be held ≥ 1 year pre‑DRHP (with carve‑outs)
rules.check:
fun i =>
      i.shares_held_duration_months ≥ 12 ∨
      i.is_govt_entity ∨
      i.via_merger_scheme ∨
      (i.is_bonus_from_free_reserve ∧ i.bonus_not_from_revaluation)
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.shares_held_duration_months ≥ 12 then ""
      else if i.is_govt_entity then ""
      else if i.via_merger_scheme then ""
      else if i.is_bonus_from_free_reserve ∧ i.bonus_not_from_revaluation then ""
      else "OFS shares not held for ≥ 1 year before DRHP and no applicable carve‑out.",
    remedy? := some "Hold OFS shares for ≥ 1 year before DRHP or satisfy a carve‑out."

rules.title: Additional OFS caps when using 6(2) route
rules.failReason: fun _ => "6(2) route not modeled; assume no additional caps."

rules.title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20 % of post‑issue capital
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoter contribution fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Form of promoters’ contribution and pricing constraints
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Contribution form fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Weighted‑average price floor for staggered convertibles
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Weighted‑average price fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Convertible‑debt only IPO: promoter equity contribution
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Project cost and equity fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Promoters’ contribution timing
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Contribution timing fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Ineligible securities fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Lock‑in of minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Lock‑in fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Lock‑in of promoters’ holding in excess of MPC
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Lock‑in excess fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Computation explanations (post‑issue base, ESOP/SAR, weighted average)
Lock‑in for pre‑issue capital held by non‑promoters
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Non‑promoter lock‑in fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Green shoe lending: lock‑in not applicable during lending period
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Green shoe lending fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Lock‑in of partly‑paid specified securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Partly‑paid lock‑in fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Inscription/recording of non‑transferability
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Non‑transferable marking fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Pledge of locked‑in specified securities by promoters
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Pledge fields not modeled; assume compliant."

rules.title: Transfer of locked‑in specified securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Transfer lock‑in fields not modeled; assume compliant."

issuer_questions.question: Is the issuer debarred from capital markets?
Do any directors or promoters have a debarment?
Is the issuer or any promoter/director a fraudulent borrower?
Is any promoter or director a fugitive economic offender?
Are there outstanding convertibles or rights before filing?
Is there an ESOP exemption for outstanding convertibles?
Is there a SAR exemption for outstanding convertibles?
Are there mandatory convertibles fully paid and converted?
Provide NTA for each of the last 3 full years (in paise).
What % of NTA is held in monetary assets?
Have excess monetary assets been used or firmly committed?
Is the IPO entirely an offer for sale (no fresh issue)?
Provide operating profit for each of the last 3 full years (in paise).
Provide net worth for each of the last 3 full years (in paise).
Has the company changed its name within the last 1 year?
What % of last year’s revenue came from the new‑name activity?
Is the issuer using book‑building for the offer?
Has QIB allocation been completed?
Provide SR net worth (in paise).
Is the issuer a technology‑intensive firm?
Is the SR holder an executive of the issuer?
What is the SR voting ratio (e.g., 2:1)?
How many SR classes are issued?
Do SR shares have the same face value as ordinary shares?
Were SR shares issued at least 3 months before DRHP?
Has the issuer applied to a stock exchange?
Has the issuer executed a depository agreement?
Are promoter‑held securities dematerialised?
Are there any partly‑paid equity shares outstanding?
Is 75 % of finance tied up via verifiable means?
What % of the issue amount is for general corporate purposes?
How many months have fully paid shares been held before filing?
Is the issuer a government entity?
Is the issuer part of a merger scheme?
Is the OFS share a bonus from free reserves?
Is the bonus not from revaluation?
